title: emanation modpack
description: little modpack for friends, focusing on the Cobblemon and Create mods
body:
A simple modpack focusing on the Cobblemon and Create mods, with some extras added in. Made for my friends :3 If you want a standard modded experience without too many mods, this is the modpack for you! Features:
  • Make cool machines and automated farms!
  • Explore the world of Pokémon!
  • Relive the classic Aether mod!
  • Backpacks, some with special abilities!
  • Lots of new tools, weapons, and building blocks!
  • Refreshing new world generation!
  • Use waystones to make travel easier!
  • Everyone gets their fair share of loot!
  • Ever get annoyed by moving mobs around? Just carry them around!
  • Immersive proximity voice chat with Plasmo Voice! (depends on your hosting provider)
  • Performance and quality of life mods!
  • And more!!
This modpack is intended for multiplayer but can be enjoyed in singleplayer.
You can find the modpack for the server side here: [emanation modpack (server)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/emanation-modpack-(server)) It is highly recommended you use this modpack with these datapacks:
  • Cobblemon additions by strikebyte
    • or
  • CobbleTowns: Continued by JonathansPlayroom
    • These datapacks add cities, towns, Pokémon Centers, and PokéMarts!
  • PokeLoot by Quim201
    • Add randomly spawning Pokéballs that contain loot just like the Pokémon games!
  • RCT Badges by hd42
    • Gym badges drop from gym leaders after you defeat them!
Included resourcepacks:
  • CobbleFolk Skin Pack JonathansPlayroom
  • Radical Cobblemon Trainer Textures Plus by forestfire
^ There might be some bugs such as the Trainer Association villager looking like a horrifying mangled mess. I will update this if the developers fix it.
